tool_calls:
while IFS= read -r -d '' file; do
  count=$(grep -o -w 'getData' "$file" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
  count=${count//[[:space:]]/}
  if [[ "$count" -gt 0 ]]; then
    sed -i 's/\<getData\>/fetchRecords/g' "$file"
    printf '%s: %s replacements\n' "$file" "$count"
  fi
done < <(find /src -type f -name '*.py' -print0 2>/dev/null | sort -z)

find /src -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort | while IFS= read -r file; do
  count=$(grep -o -w 'getData' "$file" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
  count=${count//[[:space:]]/}
  if [[ "$count" -gt 0 ]]; then
    sed -i 's/\<getData\>/fetchRecords/g' "$file"
    printf '%s: %s replacements\n' "$file" "$count"
  fi
done
